Name: -1_trendy_shows_fashion_examples
Representative_Docs: ['When people dress tastefully in good fashion.  Such as a trendy jeans and shirt.  It has good taste and style.', 'The person would choose comedy, for example, that does not include vulgarity, racism, or violence. Even if this person would normally choose this type of humor, he/she does not do so, out of consideration for those around them who might find these things objectionable.', 'Liking shows that have an involved plot to them or are dispensing educational information. Murder mysteries, detective shows, and some superhero shows are good examples of the former. Documentaries about geology, history, and animals are examples of the latter.']

Name: 0_art_say_mean_usually
Representative_Docs: ["Someone has a good taste in something when they're perceived to like something similar to myself. We see 'good taste' in a certain subject as something that we also enjoy. For example, I would say someone has a good taste in food if I perceive that they like similar foods to me. Having a good taste is subjective and aligns closely with my values.", "When I say that someone has good taste, I generally mean that I can see value and positive qualities in the art/music/literature that they like, even if I don't enjoy it myself.  However I must admit that much of the time, when I say that someone has good taste, it means that they share my taste, i.e. they admire the art/music/literature that I myself enjoy.", "What I mean by that is they have a taste similar to mine or one I can appreciate. People who enjoy the same type of books or movies or art.  Though I can understand someone may have exceptional taste and I don't agree with it.  Such as enjoying Rothko's art or Wharton's novels.  "]

Name: 1_interact_services_look_style
Representative_Docs: ['That something is clean, fits well on their person or in ba room, and is on keeping with social norms. There can also be a moral / relational component when talking about dating.', "I think it means that people chose to do or see or say or dress or participate in a way that is morally good and not offensive to other people. They don't like things that are garish. They respect other people and interact with them as they would want others to interact with them. They are not exhibitionists. ", 'I believe that it means that they have a good selection of goods or services used by them.  It means other people value those choices and admire their selection of goods or services.  It makes the person more desirable because of a finer choices in life.']
